title: Chinese Buddhist: Cong Rong Lu (Book of Equanimity) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Cong Rong Lu (Book of Equanimity)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Cong Rong Lu (Book of Equanimity)

translation.text: From Cong Rong Lu (Book of Equanimity): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
